_comment: Used only by `npm run test:components` (tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.test.json). The real app build reads tsconfig.json, not this file. next/link and next/cache are mocked via `paths` below — needed since the authoring UI pass added real navigation (ArticleListTable) and Server Actions that call revalidatePath (app/articles/actions.ts, pulled in transitively by FieldSourceBadge).
